message:
refactor(conformance): capture oracle errors as report mismatches instead of propagating

Refactor test_no_legacy_oracle_fallback_disabled and test_python_spawn_failure
to expect run_packet_by_id() to return a report rather than an error. Oracle
and dependency failures are now captured as mismatches within individual test
case results rather than propagating as top-level errors, enabling continued
test execution and finer-grained visibility into which specific cases failed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
